subject: chore(config): remove stale GitHub Pages migration comment
body:
The migration from GitHub Pages to Vercel was already completed.
Removed the leftover comment referencing the old base path and
404.html hack — the code already speaks for itself (no base
property, vercel.json handles routing).

No GitHub Actions workflow files existed to delete. All base-path
prefixes were already cleaned up in a prior migration.

Tags: cleanup, deployment
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: deployment
Semver: patch
